chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1004 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 6990/2022 25.05.2022 Petitioner present in person. ----- Urgency granted. This petition raises some issues that concern with the maintenance and management of Peoples Medical College Hospital Nawabshah. We have inquired if any complaint or application has been made under the recently promulgated Act before Sindh Health Care Commission, petitioner has taken us to the letter dated 22nd March 2022 which was subsequent to the filing of this petition and there is nothing mentioned about him approaching the Commission prior to the filing of this petition. Be that as it may, we are of the view that the grievance of the petitioner could well be addressed by the Sindh Health Care Commission where his complaint / application is said to be pending. We, therefore, direct that the Sindh Health Care Commission shall do the needful in pursuance of the complaint lodged by the petitioner which is available along with the statement of 7th April 2022, if it is pending there. The complaint itself is dated 22.03.2022. The petition having served its purpose is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
